title: Compliance: crypto/oscore.py OSCORE
description: Policy: 06-security.md §8.7. File: python/src/lichen/crypto/oscore.py. Status: COMPLIANT. MemorySecurityContext bridges EDHOC to aiocoap OSCORE. Derives sender/recipient keys via derive_keys(), implements replay window, and exports from EDHOC context.
close_reason: Verified compliant: RFC 8613 sequence number limit (40-bit max), ID length validation (iv_bytes-6), replay protection via aiocoap ReplayWindow, key derivation via SecurityContextUtils, echo recovery per B.1.2. EDHOC integration correct per Section 8.8. All 5 unit tests pass.
